Document:
# Roleplay Rule 4 - Act responsible as an antagonist As an antagonist, it is your job to further the round and make an interesting story, winning should never be the top priority.
Mass murder without reason should be avoided. It is rarely fun for anyone other than the person doing it.
Antagonists should avoid specifically targeting Arrivals and cryosleep. Attacking those places intentionally may result in administrative action.
Antagonists should avoid antagonistic behaviours on the evac shuttle unless required by self defense or if absolutely necessary. Actions on the emergency shuttle rarely make a story interesting.
All antagonistic actions should cease at central command. Nuclear Operatives and Zombies are exempt from this, & may cause destruction at Central Command if they ever arrive there.
